name: electril-build-tower
author: Aslan
description:
Increases Build Tower range by 5x for Electril/Elecian faction.

Features:
- Visual range: 50 tiles -> 250 tiles
- Build support range: 50 tiles -> 250 tiles
- Perfect for large-scale construction with Elecian faction

Note: Build towers outside camera view may not update (game limitation)
